vision: Implement the 7-Habits PRD: vision.md, context.md, retro-actions.json, and L0 backlog scoring, adding rigour to ts-deliver-router, ts-project-planner, and ts-project-scaffolder without expanding scope.

releases.name: 7habits-features
releases.goal: Add rigour, never add scope — close the H2/H3/H4/H5/H7 gaps identified in PRD_7habits_features.md.
exit_criteria: vision-check gate row live in registry-think.md; G1 blocks on missing/empty vision.md
context-captured always-row live in registry-think.md; Plan reads context.md
retro-actions-captured gate row live in registry-reflect.md; cycle close blocks on untriaged entries
discovery.json/plan.json/iteration.json carry exit_criteria[], q2_score, value_to[] per PRD §4.5
ts-deliver-router and ts-project-planner SKILL.md + SKILL_caveman.md updated in the same session as their schema/registry changes

epics.title: vision.md — immutable outcome anchor (PRD §1)
epics.notes: ts-project-scaffolder: vision.md template + protected-files rule. ts-deliver-router: vision-check gate row in registry-think.md, state.json artifacts.think.vision field, G1 checklist item.

epics.title: context.md — durable understanding artifact (PRD §2)
epics.notes: ts-deliver-router: context.md as discuss-step output, context-captured always-row, state.json artifacts.think.context field, propose step reads context.md, ingest sub-loop mid-delivery updates.

epics.title: retro-actions.json — harness improvement loop (PRD §3)
epics.notes: ts-deliver-router: retro-actions.json as Reflect-phase output, retro-actions-captured gate row, state.json artifacts.reflect.retro_actions field, /ts-iteration close triage step, SKILL-PATCH-RETRO integration for accepted skill-patch entries.

epics.title: L0 backlog scoring — exit_criteria[], q2_score, value_to[] (PRD §4)
epics.notes: ts-project-planner: discovery.json exit_criteria[] required at decide-build, plan.json impact_score/effort_score/q2_score/urgency_flag/value_to[], iteration.json exit_criteria_source/q2_warning, /ts-iteration start Q2 warning, /ts-iteration next surfaces value_to[]. No new registry rows (PRD §4.6).
